meal_plan:
Here is your personalized Indian meal plan:

| Meal          | Dish                                               | Calories (Approx) | Protein Sources           | Time of Day |
| :------------ | :------------------------------------------------- | :---------------- | :------------------------ | :---------- |
| **Breakfast** | Poha (1 cup cooked) with 1 Boiled Egg              | 300               | Egg, Poha (peas/groundnuts) | 8:00 AM     |
| **Snack**     | Sprouted Moong Salad (1 small bowl with onion/tomato) | 120               | Moong (lentil sprouts)    | 11:00 AM    |
| **Lunch**     | Dal (1.5 cups) with 2 Rotis and Cabbage Sabzi (1 cup) | 500               | Dal (Lentils), Atta, Cabbage | 1:30 PM     |
| **Dinner**    | Plain Dal Khichdi (1.5 cups cooked) with Curd (1/2 cup) | 480               | Dal (Lentils), Rice, Curd | 8:00 PM     |

Here is a personalized Indian meal plan:

| Meal      | Dish                                           | Calories (Approx.) | Protein Sources                | Time of Day          |
| :-------- | :--------------------------------------------- | :----------------- | :----------------------------- | :------------------- |
| Breakfast | Poha (1.5 cups, large) with chopped onion      | 350                | Flattened Rice (minimal)       | 7:30 AM - 8:30 AM    |
| Lunch     | Dal Fry (1.5 cups) + Rice (2.5 cups)           | 625                | Lentils (Dal), Rice            | 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM    |
| Snack     | 1 Boiled Egg + Roasted Peanuts (50g)           | 355                | Egg, Peanuts                   | 5:00 PM - 6:00 PM    |
| Dinner    | Dal Tadka (1.25 cups) + 2 Wheat Roti           | 400                | Lentils (Dal), Wheat           | 8:30 PM - 9:30 PM    |
